description_long: This is a yellow, A-frame caution sign made of lightweight plastic, commonly used to warn pedestrians of wet or slippery floors. The front face displays bold black text reading 'CAUTION WET FLOOR' along with a red-bordered triangular warning symbol featuring a stylized figure slipping. The sign has a built-in handle at the top for easy carrying and placement, and the base is wide for stability. The surface is smooth with some matte finish, and the sign is hollow inside, making it easy to transport and store. The rear face is identical to the front, ensuring visibility from both directions.
description: A yellow, freestanding A-frame caution sign with 'CAUTION WET FLOOR' text and a slipping figure symbol, made of lightweight plastic and featuring a handle at the top.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin, A-frame profile and the hollow interior of the sign.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'CAUTION WET FLOOR' text, slipping figure symbol, and handle at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing the A-frame profile and hollow structure.
description_view_3: Rear view, identical to the front, with the same warning text and symbol visible.
